Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
364 
REV_CNTR_RATE_AMT 
LABEL: 
Revenue Center Rate Amount 
DESCRIPTION: Charges relating to unit cost associated with the revenue center code. 
SHORT NAME: REV_RATE 
LONG NAME: REV_CNTR_RATE_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
For SNF PPS claims (when revenue center code equals “0022”), CMS has developed a SNF PRICER to 
compute the rate based
